label: strict-tightening
headline_statement: Conjecture~\ref{conj:strict-tightening} is confirmed as a directional strict-tightening statement: for any endpoint direction whose unrestricted optimizer set is supported only on nondegenerate Frechet equality faces, the finite-\(\Gamma\) endpoint is strictly inside the corresponding unrestricted endpoint, and endpoint equality can occur only through a finite-\(\Gamma\)-compatible unrestricted optimizer profile.
